steps.title: Identify what the blank must mean
steps.content:
The passage emphasizes that the ablution area is “almost always included” in mosque designs and represents a “standard feature.”
The blank needs a word for a characteristic or defining element of mosque architecture.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the correct word
steps.content:
”Hallmark” captures a distinctive characteristic — exactly what the passage establishes about these standard mosque features. The other choices either don't convey this meaning or refer to unrelated concepts altogether.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
